category_sources: Official omniORB page describes omniORB as a CORBA ORB for C++ and Python: https://omniorb.sourceforge.io/
source_facts.description says it provides IOR and naming service utilities for omniORB.
display_name_sources: Official homepage heading is omniORB: https://omniorb.sourceforge.io/
docs_sources: Official homepage links to the documentation set.
Official omniORB documentation page lists 4.3.x user guide, omniNames, utilities, and omniidl docs.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project exposes an SVN source-code section for omniORB.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was researched.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes omniORB as a CORBA ORB for C++ and Python.
source_facts.executables lists omniNames, omniidl, and related CORBA utilities.
